flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at South Louisiana Community College rose 33% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.2k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at South Louisiana Community College rose 119% between 2006 and 2009 (3.4% → 7.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Louisiana Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).
